Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Sage of Calling Storms]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Ziel dueled the Sage of Calling Storms.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — The Sage of Calling Storms provides power to the Stormcallers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — The Sage of Calling Storms used research from the Arelius Monarch to damage Ziel's soul.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — The Sage of Calling Storms wrestles against Fury’s authority.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — The Sage of Calling Storms bound Ziel in place.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — The Sage of Calling Storms was supposed to be the best at divining the future among Reigan Shen's subordinates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — The Sage of Calling Storms screams as the world ends.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 27''' — The Sage of Calling Storms believed they had seen the divine.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — The Sage of Calling Storms once subjected Ziel to spiritual pain by twisting his tools inside Ziel's soul.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — Calling Storms is a monster.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — The Sage of Calling Storms is a manic-looking man with pale hair and blue serpents of storm madra encircling his upper arms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Calling Storms is the Sage of Calling Storms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Calling Storms' power crackles with the hungry lightning of the Weeping Dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Calling Storms has invested in regeneration.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — The Sage of Calling Storms is an Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Calling Storms can regenerate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Calling Storms uses storm madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Calling Storms can call living lightning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 16''' — Calling Storms is a character capable of regenerating even from total destruction.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — The Sage of Calling Storms left a Remnant dedicated to chaos.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
